name: zkbluff-circuits
description: ZK circuits for ZKluff card game using circom + snarkjs

scripts.install:circom: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh && cargo install circom
scripts.build:all: npm run build:commitment && npm run build:declaration
scripts.ptau:contribute: snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot12_0000.ptau pot12_0001.ptau --name="dev" -v -e="zkbluff dev entropy"
scripts.ptau:finalize: snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 pot12_0001.ptau pot12_final.ptau -v
scripts.ptau:all: npm run ptau:new && npm run ptau:contribute && npm run ptau:finalize
scripts.setup:commitment: snarkjs groth16 setup build/hand_commitment.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/hand_commitment_0000.zkey
scripts.setup:declaration: snarkjs groth16 setup build/declaration_valid.r1cs pot12_final.ptau build/declaration_valid_0000.zkey
scripts.zkey:contribute:commitment: snarkjs zkey contribute build/hand_commitment_0000.zkey build/hand_commitment_final.zkey --name="dev" -e="zkbluff dev entropy"
scripts.zkey:contribute:declaration: snarkjs zkey contribute build/declaration_valid_0000.zkey build/declaration_valid_final.zkey --name="dev" -e="zkbluff dev entropy"
scripts.export:vk:commitment: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/hand_commitment_final.zkey build/hand_commitment_vk.json
scripts.export:vk:declaration: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/declaration_valid_final.zkey build/declaration_valid_vk.json
scripts.export:solidity: snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier build/declaration_valid_final.zkey build/Verifier.sol
scripts.prove:commitment: snarkjs groth16 prove build/hand_commitment_final.zkey build/hand_commitment_js/witness.wtns build/commitment_proof.json build/commitment_public.json
scripts.prove:declaration: snarkjs groth16 prove build/declaration_valid_final.zkey build/declaration_valid_js/witness.wtns build/declaration_proof.json build/declaration_public.json
scripts.verify:commitment: snarkjs groth16 verify build/hand_commitment_vk.json build/commitment_public.json build/commitment_proof.json
scripts.verify:declaration: snarkjs groth16 verify build/declaration_valid_vk.json build/declaration_public.json build/declaration_proof.json
scripts.full:setup: npm run ptau:all && npm run setup:commitment && npm run zkey:contribute:commitment && npm run export:vk:commitment && npm run setup:declaration && npm run zkey:contribute:declaration && npm run export:vk:declaration
